segment_description: This cluster represents larger, established urban Modern Trade grocery stores with high SKU counts, 100% cooler availability, and significant premium category sales. Serving higher-income households, these outlets are key for planned purchases and stock-up missions. Commercial focus is on range, planogram compliance, and secondary displays for premium and multi-serve formats.
segment_action: Ensure full range availability of multi-serve and premium SKUs, optimize planogram compliance, and secure secondary display space for promotional activities.
